name: Do I need a lawyer for my warehouse forklift injury workers' comp in Ogden?
description: Yes if denied or valuable; contingency fee.[1]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my warehouse forklift injury workers' comp in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if denied or valuable; contingency fee.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Not always for simple claims, but yes if denied, complex, or third-party involved - they boost settlements 2-3x.** Fees are 20% contingency from benefits.[1] Key factors: insurers lowball without counsel; free consults available. Handle paperwork yourself initially, but lawyer up if stalled. Higher payouts justify it.[10]
